def cumulative_sum(nested_tuples):
    def _sum(t):
        total = 0
        for item in t:
            if isinstance(item, tuple):
                total += _sum(item)
            elif isinstance(item, (int, float)):
                total += item
        return total
    return _sum(nested_tuples)
